original_data.value: Phase 1a complete — 259 tests, 7 feature vectors, 39 implementation requirements covered
Dogfood validation passed — 3 edges traversed on real project, 6 bugs found and fixed
Commands are markdown specs not executable agents — Phase 1b needs LLM integration for iterate()

sdlc:delta.annotation: Expanded §4.3 from Two Processing Regimes to Three Processing Phases (reflex/affect/conscious). Added §4.5 Two Sensory Systems (interoception + exteroception). Updated §7.7.1 consciousness loop to six stages with affect triage filter. Updated §7.7.6 living system table with limbic system and sensory rows.

original_data.delta: Expanded §4.3 from Two Processing Regimes to Three Processing Phases (reflex/affect/conscious). Added §4.5 Two Sensory Systems (interoception + exteroception). Updated §7.7.1 consciousness loop to six stages with affect triage filter. Updated §7.7.6 living system table with limbic system and sensory rows.

sdlc:delta.annotation: Added §8 Sensory Systems with 4 new requirements (REQ-SENSE-001 through REQ-SENSE-004). Renumbered Edge Parameterisations to §9, Tooling to §10. Total: 43 requirements (was 39).

original_data.delta: Added §8 Sensory Systems with 4 new requirements (REQ-SENSE-001 through REQ-SENSE-004). Renumbered Edge Parameterisations to §9, Tooling to §10. Total: 43 requirements (was 39).

data.description: Sensory Systems — interoception, exteroception, affect triage pipeline. Continuous monitoring independent of iterate().

original_data.value: Biological nervous system insight formalised — three processing phases (reflex/affect/conscious) replace two regimes, two sensory systems (interoception/exteroception) added as continuous signal generators

sdlc:delta.annotation: Added §4.5.4 Sensory Service Architecture — MCP service model, review boundary, two event categories, monitor/telemetry separation. Updated §7.7.1 consciousness loop to show sensory service feeding stage 4 continuously. Updated §7.7.6 living system table: interoception/exteroception now service-hosted.

original_data.delta: Added §4.5.4 Sensory Service Architecture — MCP service model, review boundary, two event categories, monitor/telemetry separation. data.description: Sensory service design — §1.8 in design doc with 8 subsections covering MCP service, interoceptive/exteroceptive monitors, affect triage, homeostatic responses, review boundary, event contracts, monitor/telemetry separation
20 acceptance criteria tests for REQ-UX-001..005 — state routing, progressive disclosure, observability, selection algorithm, recovery

data.evaluators: 10/10 required (4 skipped — no executable code at Phase 1a)
data.description: All 5 REQ-UX acceptance criteria validated: state-driven routing (8 states, per-state actions, auto-mode), progressive disclosure (5 questions, auto-detect, profile mapping), observability (rollup, Gantt, telemetry, signals, event sourcing), selection algorithm (4 priority tiers, topological walk, overrides, co-evolution), recovery (5 scenarios, non-destructive, health check, rebuildable views)

21 acceptance criteria tests for REQ-TOOL-001..010 — commands (10 exist, usage+instructions, REQ refs), release (semver, changelog, coverage), hooks (2 hooks, reflex regime, protocol enforcement), checkpoint (hash, immutable, feature states), trace (bidirectional, cross-artifact), gaps (3 layers, severity), boundary (dimension checks, ADR mandate)
All 10 REQ-TOOL acceptance criteria validated at Phase 1a depth (command spec content, hook scripts, config structure)
Code edge retroactively converged — all command specs, hook scripts, configs complete and validated by tests

15 acceptance criteria tests for REQ-LIFE-001..008 + REQ-INTENT-003 — CI/CD edges (code→cicd, cicd→running_system asset types), telemetry edges (running_system→telemetry, homeostasis), feedback loop (telemetry→intent, intent_raised, deviation quantification), lineage (telemetry tag format, REQ key checks), ecosystem signals (signal_source: ecosystem), consciousness loop (every observer), full profile (include: all)
All 9 REQ-LIFE + REQ-INTENT-003 acceptance criteria validated at Phase 1a depth
Code edge retroactively converged — consciousness loop configs, feedback loop, hooks, event sourcing all complete and validated
Design §1.8 covers all 5 REQ-SENSE requirements: MCP service architecture, 7 interoceptive + 4 exteroceptive monitors, affect triage pipeline, review boundary, draft-only autonomy, 4 event types

Created sensory_monitors.yml (7 INTRO + 4 EXTRO monitors, profile overrides, meta-monitoring) and affect_triage.yml (14 classification rules, 6 profile thresholds, agent fallback, review boundary with 5 MCP tools)

23 acceptance criteria tests for REQ-SENSE-001..005 — interoceptive monitors (7 defined, thresholds, schedules), exteroceptive monitors (4 defined, external sources, CVE filter), affect triage (rules, agent fallback, per-profile thresholds, tiered approach), configuration (profile overrides, spike disables exteroception, meta-monitoring), review boundary (4 MCP tools, draft-only autonomy, human required for modifications, architecture diagram, event categories)
All 5 REQ-SENSE acceptance criteria validated: monitoring, triage, configuration, review boundary

Design §1.10 covers all 5 REQ-COORD requirements + ADR-013 with 5 alternatives considered: event-sourced claims, inbox/serialiser, role-based authority, work isolation, Markov-aligned parallelism, single-agent backward compat

Created agent_roles.yml — 6 roles (architect, tdd_engineer, qa_engineer, devops_engineer, observer, full_stack), claim protocol config, work isolation paths, inner product parallelism, authority rules

24 acceptance criteria tests for REQ-COORD-001..005 — agent identity (roles registry, single-agent defaults, full_stack backward compat), feature assignment (claim protocol, inbox non-authoritative, no lock files, exactly-one-writer, coordination event types), work isolation (drafts/scratch paths, ephemeral state, promotion requires evaluators, spec mutations require human), parallelism (inner product routing, zero/nonzero handling), role authority (converge_edges, escalation, human universal, ADR-013 exists with alternatives)
All 5 REQ-COORD acceptance criteria validated: identity, claims, isolation, parallelism, authority

data.advisory: 10 REQ keys (INTENT-001/002/004, FEAT-001/002/003, EDGE-001/002/003/004) have implicit test coverage but no explicit Validates: tag. Telemetry layer entirely Phase 2 scope.
9 REQ keys with implicit-only coverage (INTENT-001/002/004, FEAT-001/002/003, EDGE-001/002/003). 5 test gaps: INTENT-003, LIFE-009, TOOL-008, TOOL-010, EDGE-004. Telemetry layer Phase 2 scope.

data.notes: Observer agent design — §1.11, ADR-014, Phase 2a in §3
3 observer agent markdown specs: dev, CI/CD, ops
UAT test suite Phase 1 — building 220 BDD scenarios across 11 UC clusters from specification/UAT_TEST_CASES.md
UAT test suite — UC-02 Evaluators (16 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-03 Context (12 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-04 Traceability (18 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-05 Edge Params (16 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-07 Sensory (16 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-08 Tooling (24 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-09 UX (34 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-10 Coordination (16 scenarios)
UAT test suite — UC-11 IntentEngine (14 scenarios)

data.description: Phase 1: Infrastructure + 11 test files created. 106 passing (Tier 1 config contract + Tier 2 synthetic fixtures), 121 xfail stubs (Tier 3 behavioral placeholders). workspace_state.py created with 6 pure functions. conftest.py with 5 fixture factories.

original_data.description: 121 xfail tests are not true failures — they are Tier 3 behavioral stubs awaiting runtime. Analysis shows most can be converted to Tier 1/Tier 2 tests by validating config contracts, event schemas, and pure functions against synthetic fixtures.

data.description: Phase 2: Converted 118 of 121 xfail tests to passing. Added 17 pure functions to workspace_state.py. Three-tier strategy: config contract validation (YAML configs enforce correct behavior), pure function tests (algorithms against synthetic fixtures), event schema contracts (JSON round-trip). 3 remaining xfail: timebox prioritisation (needs live clock), escalation inline display (needs interactive terminal), gap suggestions (needs LLM semantic analysis).
UC-01 Asset Graph: 28 passing — asset type registry, transitions, Markov criteria, convergence, functor encoding, escalation
UC-02 Evaluators: 16 passing — three types, composition per edge, human gate, convergence rules, accountability, attribution
UC-03 Context: 12 passing — constraint surface, hierarchy, deep merge, context hashing, spec reproducibility
UC-04 Traceability: 18 passing — REQ key format, intent events, feedback loop, feature views, circular dependency detection, task graph
UC-05 Edge Params: 16 passing — TDD red/green/refactor, BDD gherkin, UAT human gate, ADR at design edge, code tagging, hooks
UC-07 Sensory: 16 passing — interoceptive/exteroceptive signals, affect triage, tolerance breach classification
UC-08 Tooling: 23 passing + 1 xfail (gap_suggestions needs LLM) — tasks, checkpoints, release semver, gaps validation, hooks, feature views
UC-09 UX: 32 passing + 2 xfail (timebox needs live clock, escalation inline needs terminal) — state detection, selection, topological walk, recovery, zoom, escalation queue
UC-10 Coordination: 16 passing — stale claims, single-agent defaults, inner product, role-scoped convergence
UC-11 IntentEngine: 14 passing — edge→output mapping, affect triage, three output types, processing phases, escalation→intent feedback, tolerance breach, pressure equilibrium

original_data.value: UAT suite complete: 224 passing + 3 xfail across 11 UC clusters covering all 63 REQ keys. workspace_state.py now has 23 pure functions — foundation for runtime engine. Total test suite: 735 passing (non-E2E).

source_findings.description: Design incorrectly deferred telemetry to Phase 2 — telemetry is constitutive, not deferred

data.description: Added §1.12 Telemetry as Functor Product — paradigm: every product monitors itself from day one. Updated §3 Phase 2→Phase 1b for telemetry wiring. Updated §6 feature vector coverage to 11/11 with test counts. Updated §7 implementation priority to reflect telemetry-as-constitutive.

sdlc:delta.annotation: Added §0 'What the Methodology Is' — paradigm statement: the methodology is the constraints, invariants, symmetries, and projections. Everything else is emergence. Telemetry declared constitutive. Genesis declared self-compliant.

original_data.delta: Added §0 'What the Methodology Is' — paradigm statement: the methodology is the constraints, invariants, symmetries, and projections. Everything else is emergence. Telemetry declared constitutive. Genesis declared self-compliant.

source_findings.description: Methodology defined its components but never defined itself — what it IS vs what it produces was implicit

data.description: Wire dev-observer hook — close the abiogenesis loop (Task C2)
Create IntentEngine config artifact — output types, ambiguity, tolerances (Task C1)
Create session-start health check hook (Task H4)

Created on-edge-converged.sh hook — fires after edge_converged, gaps_validated, release_created events. Reads workspace snapshot (event count, feature status, stuck detection, unactioned intents) and surfaces to dev-observer agent. Updated hooks.json with PostEvent and SessionStart hook types.
Dev-observer hook wired: PostEvent hooks for edge_converged/gaps_validated/release_created → on-edge-converged.sh. Closes abiogenesis loop. 736 tests still passing.

Created intentengine_config.yml — 3 output types (reflex_log/spec_event_log/escalate), 3 ambiguity regimes, escalation boundaries per profile, 7 signal sources, tolerance schema with 7 Genesis tolerances, 3 execution modes, affect schema with 6 profile defaults.

IntentEngine config artifact created — parameterises the composition law with output types, ambiguity classification, escalation thresholds, signal sources, tolerance schema, execution modes, and affect schema.
Created on-session-start.sh — checks event log integrity (JSON validity, staleness), feature vector consistency (ID format), STATUS.md freshness. Reports issues at session open.
Session-start health check hook created — F_D(Sense) for workspace integrity at every session boundary.

data.observation: pip-audit not installed — cannot scan Python dependencies for CVEs

data.description: Created gen-spec-review.md — formal spec-boundary review with gradient check (completeness, fidelity, boundary). Created gen-escalate.md — escalation queue derived from events (stuck, tolerance, intent, review, max_iteration). Created gen-zoom.md — graph zoom in/out for sub-structure and aggregation.

original_data.value: Genesis self-compliance: npm audit clean (0 vulns/92 deps), pip-audit unavailable (install needed), 27 outdated Python packages (3 major version updates: certifi, openai, pytest)

process_gaps.description: Version alignment (plugin.json vs CLAUDE.md vs STATUS.md) should be a deterministic check, not manual
process_gaps.action: Add version consistency validator to CI pipeline

data.title: F_P Construct & Batched Evaluate
data.trigger: human decision — feature-complete requires working construct+evaluate cycle

sdlc:delta.annotation: 3 REQ keys without code implementation tag

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 1 found 3 REQ keys missing Implements: tag in canonical code
data.delta: 3 REQ keys without code implementation tag

sdlc:delta.annotation: 74 REQ keys without req= tag in any logging or metrics

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 3 found 74 REQ keys with zero telemetry coverage
data.delta: 74 REQ keys without req= tag in any logging or metrics

data.what_changed: Created ADR-S-009: Feature Vector Lifecycle — Spec Definition vs. Operational Trajectory. Formalises two-layer model (spec=definitions, workspace=trajectory), JOIN semantics (ACTIVE/PENDING/ORPHAN), inflate operation, and PoC/spike collapse rule.

Created ADR-S-010: Event-Sourced Spec Evolution. Defines feature_proposal and spec_modified event types, Draft Features Queue, promotion/rejection operations, and full causal chain from signal to spec change.
Added EVOL category and §15 Spec Evolution with REQ-EVOL-001..005. Updated total requirement count from 74 to 79 (53 High, 13 Medium, 13 Low). Added phase counts: Phase 1=57, Phase 2=22.
Added ADR-S-009 and ADR-S-010 to ADR table. Updated requirement count reference from 74 to 79.

Created ADR-S-011: Unified OpenLineage Metadata Standard. All events.jsonl entries follow OL RunEvent schema. Custom facets: sdlc:delta, sdlc:req_keys, sdlc:valence, sdlc:event_type, sdlc:proposal. Causal chaining via ParentRunFacet. Local-first invariant.
Added ADR-S-011 to spec ADR table.

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 1 found 11 orphan REQ keys (REQ-F-FPC-* series) not defined in spec
data.delta: 11 REQ keys implemented and tested but have no specification anchor

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 1 found 16 code files with no Implements: REQ-* tags
data.delta: 16 core implementation files (fd_*.py, fp_evaluate.py, fp_subprocess.py, config_loader.py, dispatch.py, workspace_state.py, gen-setup.py) have no REQ traceability

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 2 found 63 spec REQ keys with zero test coverage
data.delta: 63/74 spec requirements (85.1%) have no Validates: tag in any test file

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 3 found zero production files with req= telemetry tags
data.delta: 74 REQ keys in spec, 0 have runtime observability (req= telemetry tag). CI/CD edge not yet reached so not blocking.

warnings: REQ-F-ROBUST-001 status=in_progress but all edges converged

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 3 found 74 REQ keys without telemetry coverage
data.delta: 74 REQ keys without telemetry tagging (req= in logger calls)
data.description: All production code lacks req= telemetry tags. REQ-LIFE-004 requires feature lineage in telemetry logs. Blocks ops observer (REQ-LIFE-012) and homeostasis feedback loop.

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 2 found 4 E2E test files without Validates: tags
data.delta: 4 E2E test files missing explicit REQ traceability tags
data.description: test_e2e_bdd.py, test_e2e_convergence.py, test_e2e_homeostasis.py, test_methodology_bdd.py lack Validates: REQ-* tags. These are integration-level tests that validate core iterate/convergence behaviour.

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 2 found 3 observer-agent REQ keys without test coverage
data.delta: 3 observer agent REQ keys (REQ-LIFE-010/011/012) have no tests
data.description: Dev, CI/CD, and Ops observer agents are documented (commands/agents) but have no test coverage. Phase 2 feature — tracking as known gap.

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 2 found 8 evolution+event REQ keys without test coverage
data.delta: 8 Phase 2 REQ keys (REQ-EVOL-001..005, REQ-EVENT-002/003/004) have no tests
data.description: Spec evolution semantics (workspace-as-trajectory, JOIN semantics, feature_proposal/spec_modified events) and saga invariant have no test coverage. All are Phase 2+ planned features.

data.what_changed: Created design-tier requirements document. Anchors 11 REQ-F-FPC-* orphan keys (INT-GAPS-001 resolution). Defines REQ-F-FPC-001..006, REQ-NFR-FPC-001..003, REQ-BR-FPC-001, REQ-DATA-FPC-001 with spec parents, acceptance criteria, and traceability. Updates ADR-020 reference from placeholder to link.

original_data.value: REQ-F-ROBUST-001 top-level status=in_progress is stale; all 4 trajectory edges converged 2026-02-27
original_data.description: dev_observer detected status inconsistency: REQ-F-ROBUST-001 feature vector has status=in_progress but trajectory shows intent_requirements/converged, requirements_design/converged, design_code/converged, code_unit_tests/converged. Stale by 5 days. The workspace summary in STATUS.md flags this explicitly. Needs lifecycle housekeeping closure.
original_data.recommended_action: Update REQ-F-ROBUST-001.yml top-level status to 'converged'. No new work needed — all edges already passed.

original_data.value: 12 spec REQ keys have no feature vector assignment: REQ-EVENT-001..004 (4), REQ-EVOL-001..005 (5), REQ-TOOL-011, REQ-UX-006, REQ-UX-007
original_data.description: dev_observer delta computation: spec/AISDLC_IMPLEMENTATION_REQUIREMENTS.md defines 83 REQ keys. Active feature vectors cover 71 unique REQ keys. 12 REQ keys have no coverage in any active/*.yml requirements: array. REQ-EVENT-* (event sourcing contract) and REQ-EVOL-* (spec evolution/workspace evolution) are fully orphaned. REQ-TOOL-011/UX-006/UX-007 appear in FEATURE_VECTORS.md Satisfies clauses but are absent from the active .yml files.
original_data.recommended_action: Option A: Add REQ-EVENT-* to REQ-F-LIFE-001 requirements array (event sourcing is lifecycle). Add REQ-EVOL-* to REQ-F-TRACE-001 (spec evolution is traceability). Add TOOL-011/UX-006/UX-007 to REQ-F-TOOL-001/REQ-F-UX-001. Option B: Spawn new feature vector REQ-F-EVOL-001 for spec evolution pipeline. Choice needs human decision.

original_data.value: 9 spec REQ keys have zero Validates: tags in any test file — all in EVENT/EVOL categories
original_data.description: dev_observer test coverage scan: grep 'Validates: REQ-' across imp_claude/tests/ finds 74 unique REQ keys covered. 9 spec REQ keys are completely absent: REQ-EVENT-001..004, REQ-EVOL-001..005. These correspond precisely to the 9 fully orphaned keys (no feature vector, no test). The remaining 63/74 gap from STATUS.md is a tagging gap — REQ keys exist in tests but Validates: annotation was not added when tests were written.
original_data.recommended_action: Resolve the feature vector gap (TELEM-008) first — once REQ-EVENT-* and REQ-EVOL-* are assigned to features, test coverage can be planned. The 63/74 annotation gap is a separate lower-priority tagging sweep.

original_data.value: INT-GAPS-001 (critical) resolved: imp_claude/design/DESIGN_REQUIREMENTS.md created 2026-03-04 anchors 11 REQ-F-FPC-* keys
original_data.description: dev_observer closure observation: INT-GAPS-001 was raised 2026-03-03 as critical — 11 REQ-F-FPC-* orphan keys in code+tests with no spec anchor. As of 2026-03-04 08:00, imp_claude/design/DESIGN_REQUIREMENTS.md exists (10239 bytes) and defines REQ-F-FPC-001..006, REQ-NFR-FPC-001..002, REQ-BR-FPC-001, REQ-DATA-FPC-001. The /gen-gaps scanner is instructed to treat this file as a valid design-tier requirements anchor. The critical gap is closed.
original_data.recommended_action: Log INT-GAPS-001 as resolved in event stream. Update STATUS.md unactioned signals table. Proceed to next priority: implement feature_proposal pipeline (Stage 2+3 of consciousness loop).

original_data.value: 14 intent_raised events in log (2026-02-19 to 2026-03-03) with zero resolution events — Affect Triage Stage 2+3 not implemented
original_data.description: dev_observer accumulation analysis: 14 unique intent_raised events are in the event log. Zero intent_resolved or feature_proposal events exist. The consciousness loop described in REQ-LIFE-010, ADR-011, and STATUS.md Stage 2+3 (Affect Triage → feature_proposal → spec change) has no implementation. Signals are accumulating indefinitely. The gap includes: 1 critical (INT-GAPS-001, now resolved externally), 3 high, 7 medium, 3 low severity signals. Without a triage pipeline, these signals produce no gradient.
original_data.recommended_action: Implement feature_proposal pipeline: (1) Add 'feature_proposal' event type to event schema. (2) Implement /gen-propose command that converts triaged intent_raised to feature_proposal. (3) Implement /gen-triage to weight and escalate signals. This is the highest-priority remaining work per STATUS.md.

original_data.value: 3 Python files in imp_claude/code/ still missing Implements: REQ-* tags: migrate_events_v1_to_v2.py, installers/tests/__init__.py, installers/tests/test_gen_setup.py
original_data.description: dev_observer code scan: grep 'Implements: REQ-' across imp_claude/code/**/*.py finds 3 files without tags. STATUS.md reported 16 untagged on 2026-03-03 — significant improvement. Remaining 3: a migration script (low priority, one-off tooling), and installer test files (test infrastructure, not production code). These are low-severity gaps.
original_data.recommended_action: Add Implements: REQ-TOOL-007 to migrate_events_v1_to_v2.py (workspace migration tooling). Add Implements: REQ-TOOL-001 to installers/tests/. Accept as low priority — these are utility/test infrastructure files.

original_data.value: dev_observer manual invocation 2026-03-04 — 6 deltas computed, 7 new TELEM signals emitted (TELEM-007..013), 5 draft intents generated
original_data.description: dev_observer full protocol run completed. Invocation trigger: manual (hooks removed, first fresh telemetry since 2026-02-23). Workspace state: 673 events, 13 feature vectors (12 converged + 1 stale in_progress), 83 spec REQ keys, 71 feature vector REQ keys, 74 test-tagged REQ keys. Primary deltas: (1) ROBUST-001 stale status, (2) 12 orphan REQ keys, (3) 9 test-uncovered REQ keys, (4) INT-GAPS-001 resolved, (5) 14 unactioned intents, (6) 3 untagged code files. Observer is stateless; this report is the sole output.
original_data.recommended_action: Human review: approve draft intents INT-OBS-001..005. Highest priority: approve INT-OBS-004 (feature_proposal pipeline) — unblocks all 14 accumulated intents.

original_data.delta_description: 6 non-zero deltas: (1) REQ-F-ROBUST-001 stale in_progress [low], (2) 12 spec REQ keys with no feature vector [high], (3) 9 spec REQ keys with no test coverage [medium], (4) INT-GAPS-001 resolved today [info], (5) 14 unactioned intent_raised accumulation [high], (6) 3 code files missing Implements: tags [low]
original_data.recommended_action: Human decision required: (1) Close ROBUST-001 status flag. (2) Assign EVENT/EVOL REQs to feature vectors. (3) Approve INT-OBS-004 to implement feature_proposal pipeline.

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 1 found 24 orphan REQ keys not defined in spec (new namespaces: F-CONV x8, F-FPC-002..006 x5, BR x2, DATA x2, NFR x4, F-CALC x1, code: F-FPC-001 x1)
data.delta: 24 REQ keys referenced in code/tests have no matching entry in AISDLC_IMPLEMENTATION_REQUIREMENTS.md
resolution_options: Add these keys to AISDLC_IMPLEMENTATION_REQUIREMENTS.md (spec expansion)
Remove orphan tags from tests/code if keys are invalid

data.trigger: /gen-gaps layer 2 found 10 spec REQ keys with zero test coverage (EVENT x4, EVOL x5, ROBUST-002 x1)
data.delta: 10 REQ keys in spec have no Validates: tag in any test file — down from 63 in prior run (INT-GAPS-003)
resolution_options: Add tests validating REQ-EVENT-* (event log schema/emission)
